issues.objection: Implication for 7.21 gives a PM a concrete diagnostic to apply. The verse does not require buy-in to the metaphysics; it gives a falsifiable engineering predicate. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims a personal divine agency (vidadhāmy aham — I make firm); engineering analog stays at structural-pattern scope. Counter-example explicitly carves out structurally-inappropriate technique-fit so the analog does not collapse into 'commit to anything.' PM does not have to absorb the metaphysics; the engineering layer is operationally self-contained and the source pack carries the original at honest scope.

notes: Skeptical-PM test for 7.21: can this verse be applied to a roadmap conversation without first signing onto the Gita's frame? Yes — implication gives a concrete next-action; counter-example tells the PM where the analog does not apply. PASS.
